sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96469" key="stenagmw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στεναγ-μώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>,= <sense id="n96469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στεναγματώδης, ἀναπνοή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
